title: Eternal Night
description: This is a Challenge Pack that Makes it Always Night. Can you Survive?
body:
# Eternal Night
A Data Pack that makes it so you're not allowed to sleep the night away. This was made for fun and to challenge the player's ability to survive in a mob invested world. This is for expert players to have fun.
## Features
- Always Night.
- Unable to Skip the Night.
- Beds Explode.
- Respawn Anchor works in Overworld.
- Should work with Mods that Adds Beds.

Please credit if you use this in a Video.
